title: Allow Customization of Campaign Footer Content
excerpt:
Description
Currently, the campaign footer is locked to only include the address and unsubscribe link. We need the ability to add additional information such as compliance details, disclaimers, or brand messaging to meet…

posts.author: FilipBos (Filip Boś )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently, the campaign footer is locked to only include the address and unsubscribe link. We need the ability to add additional information such as compliance details, disclaimers, or brand messaging to meet marketing and regulatory requirements.

What are you trying to achieve

Provide flexibility to include more relevant information in the footer so campaigns are fully compliant, informative, and aligned with brand standards.

posts.author: howardrich (Howard Rich)
posts.cookedHtml: I am experiencing a problem with the Subscribe Button/Text in the footer being obscured. This is only happening when viewed in the desktop version of Outlook. It has been observed with all email recipients when viewing with the Outlook desktop version. Has anyone else observed this issues?
